home.hero_description: Pif what you no longer need. Help a neighbor and make room for something new!
home.concepts_intro: A pif is something you give to a neighbor. A wish is something you hope to find. Simple as that!
home.concept_pif_description: Something you no longer need? Your neighbor might be looking for exactly that.
home.concept_wish_description: Need something? Post a wish and maybe a neighbor can fulfill it!
home.discover_description: Scroll the feed to see what's being piffed right now
home.how_it_works_banner: See how the PIF app works!
home.how_it_works_step1_description: Tap "Pif or wish for something" and describe what you want to give away or are looking for.
home.how_it_works_step2_description: See what neighbors are sharing in the feed or on the map. Tap "My Posts" to see just your own, or tap a profile picture to see everything a neighbor has posted.
home.how_it_works_step3_description: Tap "Show interest" on a post you like. The poster then picks who gets it — for wishes, several neighbors can help.
home.how_it_works_step4_description: Once you're picked (or you've picked someone), chat under Messages to agree on a time and place.
home.how_it_works_step5_description: Once the handover is done, both the giver and the receiver confirm on their side of the chat — this marks the pif or wish as complete and builds trust in the community.
home.welcome_connected: Welcome to PIF! You are now connected.
home.check_connection: Check your internet connection and try again.
home.cannot_connect_servers: Cannot connect to servers. Check your connection.
